subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-04-04 in Germany
subcodes.first_line: You will soon make a full recovery; be assured of the grace of God. That Satan is none other than the human self. Each person has a Satan
subcodes.first_line_orig: عنقریب صحت تامه خواهی یافت مطمئن بفضلِ الهی باش این شیطان نفس انسان است
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual baptism, @spiritual transformation, @Satan; the Evil One, @living waters; water of life, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation
